_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Maintain network segmentation to isolate control systems from business networks and other external connections as directed.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing segmentation analyses that produce actionable customer, product, or market groupings with clear business application and measurable differentiation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-010 (AI, cosine: 0.355), AG-T-005 (AG, cosine: 0.329).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.467). Shared vocabulary: [business, segmentation]. DCWF-only terms [connections, control, directed, external, isolate, maintain] vs WIDAI-only terms [actionable, analyses, application, clear, customer, designing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.851, R=0.848). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.7%). "Maintain network segmentation to isolate control systems from business networks" and "Skill in designing and executing segmentation analyses that produce actionable c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.426 ≈ STS 0.467 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [business, segmentation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [business, segmentation]. DCWF-only: [connections, control, directed, external, isolate, maintain]. WIDAI-only: [actionable, analyses, application, clear, customer, designing].
